zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Swinburne於大約1232年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德勒頓時，他的父親John de Swinburne24歲，母親Avicia de Umfreville19歲。他與Margaret de Hellebek結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1324年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Swinburne于大约1232年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德勒頓时，他的父亲John de Swinburne24岁，母亲Avicia de Umfreville19岁。他与Margaret de Hellebek结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1324年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: Swinburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name primarily from Great and Little Swinburne (Northumberland), but perhaps also occasionally from one or other places similarly named, from Old English swīn ‘pig’ + burna ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Swinburne was born about 1232, in Chollerton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Swinburne, was 24 and his mother, Avicia de Umfreville, was 19. He married Margaret de Hellebek. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1324, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Swinburne est né environ 1232, à Chollerton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Swinburne, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Avicia de Umfreville, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Hellebek. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1324, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Swinburne um 1232 in Chollerton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Swinburne 24 und seine Mutter Avicia de Umfreville 19. Er hat Margaret de Hellebek geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1324 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Swinburne è nato il circa 1232 nel Chollerton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Swinburne, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Avicia de Umfreville, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Hellebek. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1324, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 94 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Swinburne(이)가 대략 1232년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 컬레르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Swinburne(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Avicia de Umfreville(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Margaret de Hellebek(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1324년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Swinburne родился около 1232 г. в местности чоллиртон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Swinburne было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Avicia de Umfreville, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Hellebek. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1324 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 94 лет.
